title: Phase1 Scan Agent Envelope
description: JSON envelope returned by ScanAgent (Phase 1 auto-scan path). Full reports are written to context/project-context.md, context/existing-patterns.md, context/tech-constraints.md; envelope carries only structured summary fields consumed by the main thread. decision_points is required (emitted for every scan even if the Agent judges no discretionary decisions are pending — in that case it MUST be []). conflicts_detected is optional and MUST be populated when the Agent detects project-pattern vs requirement conflicts; it feeds SynthesizerAgent cross-path arbitration.

summary.description: 3-5 sentence structured summary; full body MUST be written to output_files, not inlined here.

conflicts_detected.description: Project-pattern vs requirement conflicts surfaced by ScanAgent. Consumed by SynthesizerAgent during cross-path arbitration. Empty array is permitted; field may also be omitted when no conflicts detected.

existing_patterns.description: List of existing-pattern identifiers/summaries detected in the codebase.

output_files.description: Relative paths of full scan reports (typically context/project-context.md, context/existing-patterns.md, context/tech-constraints.md).

interrupt.description: Set when ScanAgent self-detects a blocker/warning that should halt or alert the parallel cohort. blocker → main thread aborts other parallel tasks + AskUserQuestion. warning → logged only, does not abort.
